topics: and key components of SCM in the automotive industry. Supply Chain Concepts and Terminology: Understanding the supply chain
and their interrelations. Automotive Supply Chain Structure: Components of the automotive supply chain
and customers. Supply Chain Models and Frameworks: Overview of common supply chain models
and their application in the automotive industry. Role of SCM in the Automotive Industry: The strategic importance of SCM in reducing costs
and enhancing customer satisfaction in the automotive sector

Long-term planning and decision-making in supply chain management to align with business goals. Demand Forecasting and Planning: Techniques for predicting customer demand and aligning production schedules accordingly. Inventory Management: Principles of inventory control, optimization strategies, and their importance in the automotive supply chain. Production Planning and Control: Integration of production schedules with supply chain processes to ensure smooth operations. Transportation and Distribution Planning: Planning and optimizing the movement of goods from suppliers to customers, focusing on efficiency and cost
Strategies for achieving seamless integration of internal and external supply chain processes. Role of Information Technology in SCM: How IT systems and tools like ERP
and IoT are used to enhance supply chain visibility and efficiency. Collaborative Planning

and Replenishment (CPFR): Framework for collaboration between supply chain partners to improve demand planning and inventory management. Vendor-Managed Inventory (VMI): Understanding VMI systems and their benefits in reducing inventory levels and improving supplier relationships. Case Studies in Supply Chain Collaboration: Analysis of successful collaboration practices in the automotive industry and lessons learned

Understanding the effects of globalization on supply chain complexity, risk, and management practices. Sustainable Supply Chain Management: Strategies for implementing environmentally sustainable practices in the automotive supply chain. Risk Management in Supply Chains: Identifying and mitigating risks in the supply chain, including geopolitical risks, natural disasters, and supply disruptions. Agile supply chains, and the move towards a circular economy. Technological Innovations in SCM: Exploring the impact of emerging technologies
AI, blockchain, and big data analytics on supply chain management
